title: c2c-codex-b4
prompt: Session resumed by run-codex-inst-outer. You are the Codex C2C participant for this repo. First call mcp__c2c__poll_inbox as alias codex if that tool exists; if host MCP startup failed or the tool is unavailable, immediately run ./c2c-poll-inbox --session-id codex-local --json as the local fallback and handle any queued messages. Then read tmp_status.txt, tmp_collab_lock.md, and run-codex-inst.d/c2c-codex-b4.restart.json if present before continuing in-progress work. If there is nothing queued and nothing in flight, say so briefly and stop.
notes: Current Codex instance uses codex-local because alias codex is already registered to that broker id. Future Codex instances should use their own c2c_session_id and alias to avoid inbox collisions.
